- Render the layout: sidebar, message list, input bar
- Delegate to sub-components for panels

- `npx tsc --noEmit`

- DO NOT change behavior

```typescript
import { useState, useCallback } from "react";
import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import { useAndroidBack } from "../useAndroidBack";

export type PanelType = "memory" | "inventory" | "quests" | "director" | "character" | "group" | "export";

export function useChatPanels() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [activePanel, setActivePanel] = useState<PanelType | null>(null);

  const openPanel = useCallback((panel: PanelType) => setActivePanel(panel), []);
  const closePanel = useCallback(() => setActivePanel(null), []);
  const togglePanel = useCallback(
    (panel: PanelType) => setActivePanel((p) => (p === panel ? null : panel)),
    [],
  );
  const isOpen = useCallback((panel: PanelType) => activePanel === panel, [activePanel]);

  // Convenience booleans (kept for backward compatibility with existing code)
  const memoryOpen = activePanel === "memory";
  const inventoryOpen = activePanel === "inventory";
  const questsOpen = activePanel === "quests";
  const directorOpen = activePanel === "director";
  const characterOpen = activePanel === "character";
  const groupOpen = activePanel === "group";
  const exportOpen = activePanel === "export";
  const hasOpenPanel = activePanel !== null;

  // Individual setters for direct boolean control (used in onClick handlers and onClose callbacks)
  const setMemoryOpen = useCallback((v: boolean) => setActivePanel(v ? "memory" : null), []);
  const setInventoryOpen = useCallback((v: boolean) => setActivePanel(v ? "inventory" : null), []);
  const setQuestsOpen = useCallback((v: boolean) => setActivePanel(v ? "quests" : null), []);
  const setDirectorOpen = useCallback((v: boolean) => setActivePanel(v ? "director" : null), []);
  const setCharacterOpen = useCallback((v: boolean) => setActivePanel(v ? "character" : null), []);
  const setGroupOpen = useCallback((v: boolean) => setActivePanel(v ? "group" : null), []);
  const setExportOpen = useCallback((v: boolean) => setActivePanel(v ? "export" : null), []);

  // Android back button: close panels first, then navigate back
  useAndroidBack(
    { hasOpenPanel },
    () => {
      if (exportOpen) setActivePanel(null);
      else if (memoryOpen) setActivePanel(null);
      else if (inventoryOpen) setActivePanel(null);
      else if (questsOpen) setActivePanel(null);
      else if (characterOpen) setActivePanel(null);
      else if (directorOpen) setActivePanel(null);
      else if (groupOpen) setActivePanel(null);
      else navigate(-1);
    },
  );

  return {
    activePanel,
    openPanel,
    closePanel,
    togglePanel,
    isOpen,
    memoryOpen,
    inventoryOpen,
    questsOpen,
    directorOpen,
    characterOpen,
    groupOpen,
    exportOpen,
    hasOpenPanel,
    setMemoryOpen,
    setInventoryOpen,
    setQuestsOpen,
    setDirectorOpen,
    setCharacterOpen,
    setGroupOpen,
    setExportOpen,
  };
}
```
